title: Pattern matching using LIKE not working with UFT8MB4_BIN collation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE UTF8MB4_test_extended (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, text_col1 TEXT, text_col2 TEXT, text_col3 TEXT);
INSERT INTO UTF8MB4_test_extended (text_col1, text_col2, text_col3) VALUES ('Sample text', 'Sample text', 'Sample text with more characters');

INSERT INTO UTF8MB4_test_extended (text_col1, text_col2, text_col3) VALUES ('ū†ĚĻū†Īďū†Īłū†≤Ėū†≥Źū†≥ēū†īēū†Ķľū†ĶŅū†łéū†łŹū†Ļ∑', 'ū†ĚĻū†Īďū†Īłū†≤Ėū†≥Źū†≥ēū†īēū†Ķľū†ĶŅū†łéū†łŹū†Ļ∑', 'Another text with ū†ĚĻū†Īďū†Īł');
SELECT * FROM UTF8MB4_test_extended WHERE text_col2 LIKE 'ū†ĚĻ%';
key_bug_features: LIKE operator fails with indexed UTF8MB4_BIN column
